zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bunker於1604年出生在英國戴文斯拉普頓時，她的父親John Bunker30歲，母親Elizabeth Wright21歲。她於1627年與James Bunker在英國英格蘭戴文斯拉普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1641年在她的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bunker于1604年出生在英国戴文斯拉普頓时，她的父亲John Bunker30岁，母亲Elizabeth Wright21岁。她于1627年与James Bunker在英国英格兰戴文斯拉普頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1641年在她的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Bunker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname, of Norman origin, for a reliable or good-hearted person, from Old French bon ‘good’ + cuer ‘heart’ (from Latin cor).
History: Bunker Hill in Charlestown, MA, was named as land assigned in 1634 to George Bunker of Charlestown, who had emigrated from Odell in Bedfordshire, England.

variants.name: Banker
meanings: English: from Middle English banker, banc(o)ur, bankquer, bankert ‘covering of tapestry or other fabric for a bench, couch, or chair; ornamental hanging’, possibly a nickname or occupational name for someone who made or sold such things.
English: occupational name possibly from Middle English benker, seemingly ‘maker of benches’ but recorded only in names.
English: perhaps a variant of   Bunker  .

variants.name: Bunkers
meanings: Possibly also an altered form of English   Bunker  .
In some cases possibly also Dutch: perhaps a variant of Benkers, itself a cognate of German Benkert . The surname Bunkers is very rare in the Netherlands.

variants.name: Boenker
meanings: occupational name for a carpenter, a rounded form of   Benker  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bunker was born in 1604, in Slapton, Devon, England, her father, John Bunker, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Wright, was 21. She married James Bunker in 1627, in Slapton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1641, in her hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bunker est née en 1604, à Slapton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Bunker, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wright, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé James Bunker en 1627, à Slapton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1641, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Bunker 1604 in Slapton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bunker 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Wright 21. Sie hat 1627 in Slapton, Devon, England, United Kingdom James Bunker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1641 im Alter von 37 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bunker è nata il nel 1604 nel Slapton, Devon, England, sua padre, John Bunker, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Wright, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato James Bunker nel 1627, nel Slapton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1641, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

Ela casou-se com James Bunker em 1627, em Slapton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bunker родилась в 1604 г. в местности слаптон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Bunker было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wright, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Bunker в 1627 г. в местности слаптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1641 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.
